name: Arcads
tagline: AI-powered video ad creation platform
description: Arcads lets marketers create high-performing video ads using 1,000+ AI actors and avatars. It combines AI video generation, translation, subtitles, and ad presets into one platform for D2C brands and agencies.
creator: Arcads

name: Writer
tagline: Enterprise AI platform for agentic marketing work
description: Writer is an enterprise-grade AI platform that builds custom AI agents trained on your brand DNA. It helps marketing teams create on-brand content, automate campaigns, and scale operations while maintaining enterprise security and compliance.
creator: Writer Inc
features: Custom AI agents with brand expertise

name: Albert AI
tagline: Autonomous AI for digital advertising optimization
description: Albert AI autonomously manages and optimizes paid media campaigns across Google, Meta, YouTube, and more. It uses machine learning to shift ad spend in real-time based on audience performance, delivering measurable ROI improvements.
creator: Zoomd

name: Brand24
tagline: AI-powered social listening and media monitoring
description: Brand24 monitors over 25 million online sources in real-time including social media, news, blogs, forums, and podcasts. It provides AI-powered sentiment analysis, competitor tracking, and influencer discovery for brand reputation management.
creator: Brand24

name: Influencity
tagline: AI-driven influencer marketing and social media management
description: Influencity is an all-in-one platform for influencer marketing, social media management, and social listening. It tracks 200M+ global creators and provides end-to-end campaign management from discovery to reporting.
creator: Influencity

name: Chatfuel
tagline: AI chatbots for WhatsApp, Instagram, and Facebook
description: Chatfuel builds AI-powered chatbots for WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook, and TikTok that automate customer conversations, bookings, and follow-ups. It converts inquiries into paying clients 24/7 without coding.
creator: Chatfuel

name: ContentShake AI
tagline: AI-powered SEO blog writing tool by Semrush
description: ContentShake AI helps marketers write SEO-optimized blog posts by combining AI content generation with real-time competitive data. It suggests topics, generates drafts, and optimizes content for search rankings.
creator: Semrush

name: Crayo
tagline: AI video editor for short-form social content
description: Crayo is an AI-powered video editor designed for creating short-form content for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts. It automates editing, captions, and effects to help creators and marketers produce viral clips faster.
creator: Crayo

name: 11x
tagline: AI digital workers for sales and customer engagement
description: 11x provides AI digital workers including Alice (AI SDR) and Julian (AI Phone Agent) that autonomously prospect, engage leads, and run sales conversations. It delivers 1.5x increase in qualified meetings and $1M+ pipeline in first 3 months.
creator: 11x

name: Lindy
tagline: AI work assistant for inbox, meetings, and calendar
description: Lindy is a personal AI work assistant that manages inbox, meetings, calendar, and follow-ups across tools. Trusted by 400K+ professionals, it can be delegated to via iMessage/SMS and connects to Gmail, Slack, Notion, HubSpot, and more.
creator: Lindy AI

name: CrewAI
tagline: Multi-agent orchestration framework for business automation
description: CrewAI is an open-source framework for building multi-agent AI systems where specialized agents collaborate on complex tasks. It enables businesses to create orchestrated agent crews for research, content creation, sales outreach, and operational workflows.
creator: CrewAI

name: Devin
tagline: The first fully autonomous AI software engineer
description: Devin by Cognition is an AI software engineer that can independently plan, code, debug, and deploy software. It handles complex multi-file refactoring, migrations, and feature development with minimal human oversight, achieving 8x engineering efficiency gains.
creator: Cognition

name: Bolt
tagline: AI builder for websites, apps, and prototypes
description: Bolt (formerly Bolt.new) is a professional vibe coding tool that creates full-stack web applications by chatting with AI. It integrates frontier coding agents, handles projects 1000x larger than before, and includes built-in hosting, databases, and SEO.
creator: StackBlitz

name: Lovable
tagline: AI app builder for vibe coding enthusiasts
description: Lovable lets anyone create apps and websites by chatting with AI. It's designed for non-technical founders, designers, and product managers who want to go from idea to working prototype without writing code.
creator: Lovable

name: v0
tagline: AI-powered app and website builder by Vercel
description: v0 by Vercel generates working web applications from text prompts with agentic capabilities. It plans tasks, connects to databases, deploys to production, and supports design systems — going from idea to live site in seconds.
creator: Vercel

name: Amazon Q Developer
tagline: AWS-powered AI coding assistant for cloud development
description: Amazon Q Developer is an AI coding assistant built for AWS environments. It generates code, transforms legacy applications, troubleshoots issues, and automates code reviews with deep integration into AWS services and infrastructure.
creator: Amazon Web Services

name: ThoughtSpot
tagline: Agentic analytics platform powered by AI
description: ThoughtSpot is an agentic analytics platform that lets users ask data questions in natural language and get instant, explainable AI insights. Its Spotter agent provides industry-tailored analytics for enterprise decision-making.
creator: ThoughtSpot

name: Polymer
tagline: AI-driven embedded analytics for products
description: Polymer lets developers embed AI-powered analytics, charts, and visualizations into their products with minimal code. It transforms spreadsheets into interactive databases and provides AI-driven insights for user retention and engagement.
creator: Polymer

name: Numerous.ai
tagline: ChatGPT-powered AI inside Google Sheets and Excel
description: Numerous.ai brings AI capabilities directly into spreadsheets using a simple =AI function. It handles content generation, data cleaning, classification, summarization, and research at scale without requiring API keys or technical setup.
creator: Numerous.ai

name: Domo
tagline: End-to-end data platform with AI agents
description: Domo is an end-to-end data platform that combines integration, transformation, BI, conversational AI, and automation. Its Agent Catalyst feature enables autonomous AI agents that monitor data and trigger workflows without human prompts.
creator: Domo

name: Obviously AI
tagline: No-code machine learning and predictive analytics
description: Obviously AI enables anyone to build and deploy machine learning models without coding. Users can predict outcomes, classify data, and generate forecasts by simply uploading a dataset and selecting a target column.
creator: Obviously AI

name: Mode
tagline: Collaborative analytics platform with AI assistance
description: Mode combines SQL, Python, and visual analytics in a collaborative platform with AI-powered features. It helps data teams build reports, dashboards, and interactive notebooks while AI assists with query generation and insight discovery.
creator: Mode Analytics

name: Alteryx
tagline: AI-powered data preparation and analytics automation
description: Alteryx automates data preparation, blending, and advanced analytics with AI assistance. It enables data analysts and engineers to build repeatable workflows for data cleaning, transformation, and predictive modeling without heavy coding.
creator: Alteryx

name: Luma Dream Machine
tagline: Next-gen AI video generation from text and images
description: Luma's Dream Machine creates high-quality, realistic video clips from text prompts or reference images. The Ray2 model (2025) delivers impressive physics-aware motion, cinematic camera movements, and consistent character rendering. It's become a top choice for creators wanting quick, high-fidelity video generation.
creator: Luma AI

name: Flux by Black Forest Labs
tagline: State-of-the-art open-source image generation model
description: Flux is a family of image generation models from Black Forest Labs (founded by ex-Stability AI researchers). Released in 2024, Flux quickly became the leading open-source alternative to Midjourney, offering exceptional prompt adherence, photorealism, and fine detail. Its open nature has spawned a massive ecosystem of fine-tuned variants.
creator: Black Forest Labs

name: Veo 3
tagline: Google DeepMind's cinematic AI video generator
description: Veo 3 is Google DeepMind's advanced video generation model, capable of creating cinematic-quality clips with synchronized audio, realistic physics, and coherent narratives. Launched in 2025, it represents a major leap in AI video quality and is integrated into YouTube's creation tools.
creator: Google DeepMind

name: Hailuo AI
tagline: Fast, high-quality AI video generation from MiniMax
description: Hailuo AI (by MiniMax) emerged in 2025 as a surprisingly capable video generation tool, offering fast generation times and impressive quality. Known for its natural motion, expressive characters, and ability to generate longer clips. Gained a large following among AI video creators for its accessibility and consistent output quality.
creator: MiniMax

name: Perplexity AI
tagline: AI-powered answer engine with real-time web sources
description: Perplexity combines search and AI to deliver cited, conversational answers to complex questions. Exploded in popularity in 2024-2025 as a research alternative to Google. Features include follow-up questions, file uploads, multi-model support (GPT-4, Claude, etc.), and Pro Search for deeper analysis with source verification.
creator: Perplexity AI

name: Fathom
tagline: AI meeting assistant that records, transcribes, and summarizes
description: Fathom automatically records, transcribes, and generates AI summaries of your meetings with action items and key highlights. Rose to prominence in 2024-2025 as one of the best free meeting AI tools. Works with Zoom, Google Meet, and Teams, and lets you highlight moments in real-time during calls.
creator: Fathom

name: Granola
tagline: AI notepad that enhances your meeting notes
description: Granola takes your rough meeting notes and enhances them with AI, combining what you typed with the actual conversation transcript. Unlike fully automated tools, it respects your note-taking style and adds context, action items, and structure. Launched in 2024 and quickly became a favorite among executives and managers.
creator: Granola
features: Enhances your handwritten notes with AI

name: Hugging Face
tagline: The open-source platform for ML models, datasets, and spaces
description: Hugging Face has become the GitHub of machine learning, hosting 500K+ models, 100K+ datasets, and 300K+ demo apps (Spaces). Exploded in 2024-2025 as the central hub for open-source AI, from LLMs to diffusion models. Its Transformers library, Inference API, and Spaces platform make it indispensable for ML practitioners.
creator: Hugging Face

name: LangChain
tagline: Framework for building LLM-powered applications
description: LangChain is the most popular framework for building applications powered by large language models. It provides abstractions for chains, agents, memory, retrieval, and tool use. The 2025 LangGraph extension added stateful multi-agent orchestration. Used by thousands of companies to build production AI applications.
creator: LangChain

name: Replicate
tagline: Run and fine-tune ML models with a simple API
description: Replicate lets you run open-source ML models via a simple API, without managing infrastructure. Hosts thousands of models from image generation to LLMs to audio processing. Became essential in 2024-2025 for developers who want to integrate AI capabilities without building their own ML infrastructure.
creator: Replicate

name: Weights & Biases
tagline: ML experiment tracking, model management, and evaluation
description: Weights & Biases (W&B) is the leading platform for ML experiment tracking, model versioning, and evaluation. Used by teams at OpenAI, NVIDIA, and thousands of ML teams worldwide. The 2025 launch of Weave added LLM-specific evaluation and tracing tools, making it essential for production AI development.
creator: Weights & Biases

name: Together AI
tagline: Cloud platform for training and running open-source AI models
description: Together AI provides a comprehensive cloud platform for running, fine-tuning, and training open-source AI models at scale. Offers access to 100+ open models with competitive pricing. Gained significant traction in 2025 as the go-to platform for teams building on open-source AI without managing GPU infrastructure.
creator: Together AI

name: MacroFactor
tagline: AI-powered adaptive nutrition and macro tracking
description: MacroFactor uses AI to dynamically calculate your total daily energy expenditure (TDEE) and adapt your nutrition plan based on real-world results. Unlike static calorie counters, it adjusts recommendations weekly based on your actual weight trends. Praised by nutritionists and fitness enthusiasts for its evidence-based approach.
creator: Stronger By Science

name: Gymbai
tagline: AI personal trainer and nutrition coach in your pocket
description: Gymbai combines AI-powered workout coaching with nutrition tracking, acting as a full personal trainer in app form. It generates personalized workout plans, tracks your food with photo recognition, and adapts based on your progress. Launched in 2025 and quickly gained traction as an affordable AI fitness alternative.
creator: Gymbai

name: Wysa
tagline: AI-powered mental health support and therapy companion
description: Wysa is an evidence-based AI mental health chatbot that uses cognitive behavioral therapy (CBT), dialectical behavior therapy (DBT), and mindfulness techniques. Used by 5M+ people worldwide and clinically validated through multiple studies. Offers 24/7 emotional support with optional human therapist escalation.
creator: Wysa

name: Tempo Studio
tagline: AI-powered home gym with real-time form correction
description: Tempo Studio uses 3D motion capture and AI to provide real-time form feedback during strength training workouts. It counts reps, suggests weight adjustments, and corrects your form to prevent injuries. The 2025 update added AI-personalized training programs that adapt based on your performance data.
creator: Tempo
features: Automatic rep counting and weight tracking

name: Foodvisor
tagline: AI nutrition coach with photo-based food tracking
description: Foodvisor uses AI to analyze photos of your meals and instantly estimate calories, macros, and portion sizes. The 2025 update improved accuracy significantly and added a virtual nutritionist that provides personalized meal suggestions based on your goals, dietary preferences, and nutritional gaps.
creator: Foodvisor

name: Artisan
tagline: AI BDR agent that finds leads and books meetings
description: Artisan's AI agent Ava works as an autonomous business development representative, handling lead discovery, personalized outreach across email and LinkedIn, objection handling, and meeting booking. Designed to replace manual SDR work at a fraction of the cost.
creator: Artisan

name: Salesforge
tagline: AI-powered cold email at scale
description: Salesforge uses AI to generate and send personalized cold emails at scale, with built-in email warm-up and deliverability optimization. The platform crafts unique messages for each prospect using AI-driven personalization engines.
creator: Salesforge

name: Nooks
tagline: AI parallel dialer for sales teams
description: Nooks is an AI-powered parallel dialer that lets sales reps call multiple prospects simultaneously, with AI handling voicemail drops and call analysis. It dramatically increases connect rates and pipeline generation through intelligent call automation.
creator: Nooks

name: Attention
tagline: AI-powered sales call intelligence
description: Attention uses AI to analyze sales calls in real time, providing actionable insights, automated CRM updates, and coaching recommendations. It transcribes conversations, identifies key moments, and helps reps improve their closing techniques.
creator: Attention

name: Persana AI
tagline: Multi-agent AI sales platform
description: Persana AI deploys specialized AI agents (Alex, Perry, Nia) for different sales functions including prospecting, outreach, and nurturing. Each agent is trained for specific GTM tasks and works collaboratively to drive pipeline growth.
creator: Persana AI

name: AiSDR
tagline: AI sales development rep with multimedia outreach
description: AiSDR provides an autonomous AI sales development representative that handles multi-channel outreach including email, LinkedIn, video, and phone. It generates personalized sequences and manages entire outbound workflows end-to-end.
creator: AiSDR

name: Autobound
tagline: AI-driven sales personalization engine
description: Autobound uses AI to generate hyper-personalized sales messages by analyzing 700+ signal types including news, job changes, tech stack, and intent data. It integrates with existing sales tools to deliver contextual outreach at scale.
creator: Autobound

name: Unify
tagline: AI-powered go-to-market platform
description: Unify is an AI-native GTM platform that automates sales workflows from lead research to personalized outreach. It uses AI agents to identify buying signals, enrich prospect data, and execute multi-step sequences across channels.
creator: Unify

name: Decagon
tagline: AI agents for enterprise customer support
description: Decagon provides AI-powered customer support agents that handle complex queries with deep reasoning capabilities. The platform integrates with existing support stacks and delivers accurate, context-aware responses at enterprise scale.
creator: Decagon

name: Ada
tagline: AI customer service platform for automation
description: Ada is an AI-powered customer service platform that automates support interactions across chat, email, and phone. Its AI agent resolves a high percentage of inquiries without human intervention while maintaining brand voice and customer satisfaction.
creator: Ada

name: Siena AI
tagline: Empathic AI customer service agents
description: Siena AI creates empathic AI agents for customer service that understand emotional context and respond with brand-appropriate tone. Specializing in ecommerce and DTC brands, Siena handles support tickets, order inquiries, and customer engagement with a human touch.
creator: Siena AI

name: Intercom Fin
tagline: AI agent built into the Intercom platform
description: Intercom Fin is an AI-powered customer service agent that leverages Intercom's existing platform to resolve support queries instantly. It uses advanced language models to provide accurate answers, escalate complex issues, and continuously improve from interactions.
creator: Intercom

name: Twig
tagline: AI customer support with deep integrations
description: Twig provides AI-powered customer support agents that deeply integrate with business tools and knowledge bases. The platform focuses on resolving complex queries accurately by understanding full customer context and history across systems.
creator: Twig

name: Kommunicate
tagline: AI chatbot platform for customer support
description: Kommunicate offers an AI-powered chatbot platform that combines automated support with human agent handoff. It supports multiple channels, integrates with popular helpdesks, and provides detailed analytics on customer interactions.
creator: Kommunicate

name: Ramp
tagline: AI-powered corporate card and spend management
description: Ramp is a finance automation platform that combines corporate cards with AI-powered spend management, expense tracking, and bill payments. Its AI analyzes spending patterns, identifies savings opportunities, and automates accounting workflows for modern finance teams.
creator: Ramp

name: Truewind
tagline: AI-powered bookkeeping and finance
description: Truewind provides AI-driven bookkeeping and financial management services for startups and growing businesses. Its AI handles transaction categorization, reconciliation, and financial reporting, delivering accurate books with minimal human intervention.
creator: Truewind

name: Stampli
tagline: AI-powered invoice management and AP automation
description: Stampli uses AI to centralize and automate the entire accounts payable lifecycle. Its AI assistant Billy the Bot handles invoice capture, coding suggestions, duplicate detection, and approval routing, making AP processing faster and more accurate.

name: Nanonets
tagline: AI document processing for finance teams
description: Nanonets provides AI-powered document processing that extracts, classifies, and validates financial documents including invoices, receipts, and contracts. It automates data entry and integrates with accounting systems to streamline financial workflows.

name: Digits
tagline: AI-native accounting and financial insights
description: Digits is an AI-native accounting platform that provides real-time financial insights, automated bookkeeping, and intelligent reporting. It connects to bank accounts and financial tools to deliver a live, accurate picture of business finances.

name: Zeni
tagline: AI-powered bookkeeping with CFO-level insights
description: Zeni combines AI automation with expert financial services to deliver bookkeeping, accounting, and CFO-level insights for startups. Its AI handles transaction categorization, reconciliation, and provides real-time financial dashboards.

name: Tesorio
tagline: AI-powered cash flow management
description: Tesorio uses AI to predict cash flow, automate collections, and optimize working capital. Its platform analyzes AR and AP data to provide accurate cash flow forecasts and helps finance teams make data-driven decisions about receivables management.

name: Docyt
tagline: AI-powered bookkeeping and expense management
description: Docyt provides AI-driven bookkeeping that automates expense categorization, receipt capture, and financial reporting. Its platform is designed for small to mid-sized businesses seeking hands-off, accurate financial management powered by artificial intelligence.
creator: Docyt

name: Brex
tagline: AI-powered spend management for enterprises
description: Brex offers an AI-enhanced financial platform combining corporate cards, expense management, bill pay, and travel booking. Its AI automates expense categorization, policy enforcement, and provides real-time spend analytics for growing companies.

name: Paradox (Olivia)
tagline: Conversational AI recruiting assistant
description: Paradox's AI assistant Olivia handles high-volume recruiting through conversational AI, managing candidate screening, interview scheduling, and Q&A via chat and SMS. It's designed for frontline and hourly hiring where speed and candidate experience are critical.

name: Phenom
tagline: AI-powered talent experience management
description: Phenom provides an AI-driven talent experience platform that personalizes every step of the candidate and employee journey. From intelligent career sites to automated sourcing and internal mobility, Phenom creates Netflix-like job recommendations tailored to each individual.

name: hireEZ
tagline: AI-powered outbound recruiting platform
description: hireEZ is an AI sourcing platform that searches over 1 billion public profiles to find qualified passive candidates. It provides contact discovery, automated outreach, and diversity sourcing tools to help recruiting teams proactively build talent pipelines.

name: Leena AI
tagline: AI HR service desk and employee support
description: Leena AI is an HR automation assistant that uses generative AI to handle employee queries, automate HR help desk operations, and streamline onboarding. Its conversational capabilities resolve HR tickets instantly, reducing service desk load significantly.

name: Manatal
tagline: AI recruiting software for fast-growing teams
description: Manatal is an AI-powered recruiting platform designed for speed and simplicity. It offers AI candidate scoring, profile enrichment from 20+ social platforms, and a drag-and-drop pipeline interface that teams can master in under an hour.

name: Turing
tagline: AI-powered global developer hiring
description: Turing combines AI with global talent sourcing to help companies hire pre-vetted remote software developers. Its AI matches employers with developers tested for both skill and cultural fit, using automated vetting and technical assessments at scale.

name: Recruitee
tagline: Collaborative AI recruiting platform
description: Recruitee is a collaborative recruitment platform that integrates AI to improve sourcing, screening, and pipeline management. It's built for scaling teams with features like AI candidate matching, automated job posting optimization, and collaborative hiring workflows.
creator: Recruitee

name: Harvey AI
tagline: AI platform for legal and professional services
description: Harvey is a purpose-built AI platform for law firms and in-house legal teams, powered by GPT technology. It assists with legal research, contract review, document drafting, and case analysis with enterprise-grade security trusted by 60+ AmLaw 100 firms across 60 countries.

name: CoCounsel
tagline: Thomson Reuters AI legal assistant
description: CoCounsel is Thomson Reuters' AI-powered legal assistant that leverages GPT-4 technology to automate contract drafting, legal research, and document review. It integrates with popular case management software and is designed for diverse legal practices beyond contract law.

name: Leah
tagline: GenAI-powered legal operations platform
description: Leah (formerly ContractPodAi) is a leading GenAI legal assistant featuring multi-LLM integration and tailored legal insights for contract management and legal operations. It serves as a central operating system for legal teams with strategic partnerships with KPMG and PwC UK.
creator: Leah (ContractPodAi)

name: Legora
tagline: Collaborative AI workspace for lawyers
description: Legora is a collaborative AI platform that helps lawyers review and research faster, draft smarter, and advise with precision. It adapts to existing workflows with solutions for M&A, litigation, tax, and banking, backed by ISO 42001, ISO 27001, and SOC 2 certifications.
creator: Legora
features: Workflow automation for M&A and litigation

name: Paxton AI
tagline: All-in-one AI legal assistant
description: Paxton is an essential AI legal assistant with mastery of law that integrates with how lawyers work. It answers questions, provides insights, helps with legal research, drafting memos, and identifying potential issues in policy documents — serving as both teammate and legal encyclopedia.
creator: Paxton AI
features: Legal research and case law search

name: Clearbrief
tagline: AI for legal-grade accuracy in Word
description: Clearbrief provides AI-powered legal writing tools with verifiable, hyperlinked citations directly in Microsoft Word. Named Legalweek 2026 Litigation Technology of the Year, it's trusted by AmLaw 10 firms, federal courts, and the American Arbitration Association for fact-checking and trial preparation.
creator: Clearbrief
features: Rapid trial preparation and evidence review

name: eBrevia
tagline: AI-driven contract review and drafting
description: eBrevia uses AI to transform contract review, extraction, and drafting with 90% time savings and 60% increased accuracy. Ranked as a Tier 1 solution for contract review by LegalTech Hub, it supports 37 languages and integrates with major VDRs, SharePoint, Box, and Salesforce.
creator: eBrevia
features: Custom-trainable AI for various use cases

name: Ironclad Jurist
tagline: AI legal assistant for contract operations
description: Jurist is Ironclad's AI legal assistant that drafts, reviews, and researches contracts as part of a full-stack contract lifecycle management platform. It auto-extracts 190+ contract metadata elements and offers AI Playbooks for custom redline logic enforcement.
creator: Ironclad
features: AI Assist for redlining and clause flagging
Custom AI Playbooks for contract standards

name: Knowt
tagline: Free AI-powered study tool and Quizlet alternative
description: Knowt is a free AI study platform used by over 5 million students and teachers, with 50% of all AP students using it for exam prep. It generates flashcards, quizzes, and practice tests from notes using AI, offering learn mode, matching games, and spaced repetition — all completely free.
creator: Knowt
features: Free learn mode and practice tests

name: Quill
tagline: AI-powered interactive writing and grammar platform
description: Quill.org is a free, AI-powered platform for teaching writing and grammar skills used by millions of students. It provides instant, targeted feedback on student writing, adapts to individual learning needs, and supports 15+ languages with tools for diagnostics, proofreading, and evidence-based writing.
creator: Quill.org
features: Diagnostic assessments with personalized learning plans

name: Nolej
tagline: Transform content into courses in minutes
description: Nolej is an AI-powered learning design platform that transforms existing content (videos, documents, presentations) into interactive courses in minutes. It automates course creation with AI-generated assessments, flashcards, and interactive elements, making curriculum design accessible to educators.
creator: Nolej

name: BeConfident
tagline: AI tutoring with conversational adaptive learning
description: BeConfident is an AI tutoring platform that uses conversational, adaptive learning approaches across multiple subjects. Raised $15.8M in Series A funding from Prosus Ventures in 2026 for global expansion, embedding learning into everyday interfaces students already use.
creator: BeConfident

name: Alpha School
tagline: AI-powered private school with 2-hour learning
description: Alpha School is an AI-powered private school that uses a 2-hour learning model where AI tutors adapt to each student's pace and curiosity. Students complete core academics in just 2 hours daily using personalized AI instruction, freeing time for real-world skill development and passion projects.
creator: Alpha School

name: Gradescope
tagline: AI-assisted grading for all subjects
description: Gradescope is an AI-assisted grading platform used by 140,000+ instructors across 2,600+ universities, having graded over 700 million questions. It supports paper-based, digital, and code assignments with AI answer grouping, flexible rubrics, and detailed analytics to cut grading time in half.
creator: Turnitin (Gradescope)
features: Support for paper, digital, and code assignments

name: Clerk.io
tagline: AI agent for more profitable e-commerce
description: Clerk.io is an AI-powered e-commerce platform trained on 15 years of data from millions of successful conversions. It provides intelligent search, personalized recommendations, AI chat, audience segmentation, and email personalization — finding where stores lose money and fixing it automatically.
creator: Clerk.io
features: AI-powered product search with intent understanding
Audience segmentation for ads and email

name: LimeSpot
tagline: AI-powered e-commerce personalization for Shopify
description: LimeSpot is an AI-powered personalization platform for Shopify and BigCommerce that adapts the shopping experience in real-time. It provides intelligent product recommendations, dynamic product discovery, smart upsells, and segment-based experiences to maximize revenue for every visitor.
creator: LimeSpot

name: Recart
tagline: AI-powered SMS and messenger marketing for e-commerce
description: Recart is an AI-powered marketing platform for e-commerce that specializes in SMS, Messenger, and email campaigns. It uses AI to personalize messages, optimize send times, and automate flows for abandoned carts, welcome series, and post-purchase campaigns.
creator: Recart

name: Privy
tagline: AI-powered email and SMS for Shopify stores
description: Privy is an AI-powered email and SMS marketing platform designed specifically for Shopify stores. It provides pop-ups, email automation, and SMS campaigns with AI-driven personalization to help small and growing e-commerce businesses capture leads and drive sales.
creator: Privy

name: Scite
tagline: AI for research with smart citations
description: Scite is an AI research tool trusted by 2,000,000+ researchers that searches across 280M+ articles, preprints, books, patents, and datasets. Its Smart Citations feature shows whether research findings have been supported or contradicted by later studies, providing verifiable evidence for every answer.
creator: Scite

name: ResearchRabbit
tagline: AI tool for smarter, faster literature reviews
description: ResearchRabbit is an AI-powered literature review tool trusted by 1,000,000+ researchers that accesses 270 million academic papers. It lets researchers explore literature by following curiosity rather than checking boxes, with visualizations of how papers and authors connect and how topics evolve over time.
creator: ResearchRabbit

name: Cartesia Sonic
tagline: Ultra-low latency real-time TTS with emotion and laughter
description: Cartesia's Sonic-3 is a streaming text-to-speech model that delivers sub-100ms latency with natural emotion, laughter, and expressive speech. It powers voice agents across healthcare, hospitality, and customer service with 40+ languages and instant voice cloning.
creator: Cartesia Inc
features: SOC 2 Type II and HIPAA compliant

name: WellSaid Labs
tagline: Enterprise AI voice generator built with real voice actors
description: WellSaid Labs creates human-quality text-to-speech voices modeled on licensed recordings from real voice actors. Trusted by Microsoft, Motul, and other enterprise teams for training content, e-learning, and product narration with 120+ natural-sounding voices.
creator: WellSaid Labs

name: Listnr
tagline: AI voice generator with 900+ voices and podcast hosting
description: Listnr boasts one of the largest AI voice libraries with 900+ voices across 22 languages. It converts articles and blog posts to audio, offers podcast hosting with distribution to major platforms, and provides a TTS API for developers.
creator: Listnr Inc

name: LOVO (Genny)
tagline: AI voice and video platform for content creators
description: LOVO's Genny platform combines AI voice generation with video editing capabilities. It offers realistic voices for marketing, e-learning, and entertainment content, with features like voice cloning, emotional speech styles, and an integrated video editor.
creator: LOVO AI

name: Speechify
tagline: AI text-to-speech for reading and productivity
description: Speechify transforms text into natural-sounding audio for reading articles, documents, and books aloud. With celebrity voice options, speed control up to 4.5x, and cross-platform support, it's popular among students, professionals, and accessibility users.
creator: Speechify Inc

name: Synthesys
tagline: AI voice and video generation for professional content
description: Synthesys offers AI-powered voice and video generation with a focus on professional business content. It provides realistic AI avatars, multilingual voiceovers, and an all-in-one studio for creating marketing videos, training materials, and social media content.
creator: Synthesys

name: Darktrace
tagline: Self-learning AI cybersecurity platform for autonomous threat response
description: Darktrace uses self-learning AI to detect and respond to cyber threats across networks, email, cloud, and IoT in real time. Its ActiveAI platform autonomously contains threats without human intervention, protecting over 10,000 customers in 110 countries.
creator: Darktrace

name: SentinelOne Purple AI
tagline: AI security analyst that accelerates investigation and response
description: SentinelOne's Purple AI is a generative AI security analyst that helps teams investigate threats, automate response, and unify endpoint, cloud, and identity security. Named a Leader in Gartner Magic Quadrant for 5 consecutive years.
creator: SentinelOne

name: Snyk Agent Security
tagline: AI-powered code security scanning and autonomous remediation
description: Snyk's Agent Security platform secures AI-generated code with automated vulnerability scanning, supply chain protection, and intelligent remediation. Their Agentic Architecture for Snyk Agent Fix provides faster, smarter security fixes across the development lifecycle.
creator: Snyk

name: Wiz
tagline: Cloud security platform with AI-powered risk assessment
description: Wiz provides comprehensive cloud security with AI-powered continuous risk assessment, integrating with Anthropic's Claude for autonomous vulnerability discovery. Their Red Agent and Green Agent capabilities enable machine-speed security across cloud, code, and AI infrastructure.
creator: Wiz
features: Red Agent with Claude Opus integration

name: CrowdStrike Falcon
tagline: AI-native cybersecurity platform with Charlotte AI assistant
description: CrowdStrike Falcon combines endpoint protection with Charlotte AI, a generative AI assistant that accelerates threat hunting, investigation, and response. Its unified platform covers endpoint, cloud identity, and SIEM with real-time threat intelligence.
creator: CrowdStrike

name: Keeper Security
tagline: AI-powered identity security for humans, machines, and AI agents
description: Keeper Security provides unified privileged access management with AI-powered threat detection. KeeperAI analyzes privileged activity in real time, automatically terminates high-risk sessions, and generates forensic-ready summaries across a zero-trust architecture.
creator: Keeper Security

name: Lacework
tagline: AI-driven cloud security with anomaly detection
description: Lacework uses AI and machine learning to provide cloud security posture management, workload protection, and anomaly detection. Its Polygraph Data Platform automatically baselines normal behavior and alerts on deviations across AWS, Azure, GCP, and Kubernetes.
creator: Lacework

name: Veracode
tagline: AI-powered application security scanning and remediation
description: Veracode provides AI-enhanced static and dynamic application security testing with automated remediation guidance. Their AI Fix feature generates code patches for discovered vulnerabilities, significantly reducing the time from discovery to fix.
creator: Veracode

name: Pulumi Neo
tagline: AI for infrastructure code generation and management
description: Pulumi Neo brings AI-powered infrastructure-as-code to platform teams, enabling natural language infrastructure generation, debugging, and refactoring. Built on real programming languages like TypeScript, Python, and Go, it accelerates cloud infrastructure delivery.
creator: Pulumi
features: Multi-language support (TS, Python, Go, C#, Java)

name: Vercel AI Platform
tagline: Deploy and scale AI agents without DevOps
description: Vercel's AI Platform provides AI Gateway, Workflows, and Sandbox for building and deploying AI agents at scale. Their agentic infrastructure approach eliminates traditional DevOps overhead, with 100M+ workflow runs in beta and support for durable execution.
creator: Vercel
features: AI Gateway with zero data retention

name: Bito AI Architect
tagline: Knowledge graph context layer for autonomous coding agents
description: Bito AI Architect builds a knowledge graph from code, commits, docs, and issues to provide deep system context for coding agents. It lifts coding agent success by 35% on large codebases by grounding design, coding, and code review in the same contextual graph.
creator: Bito

name: Depot
tagline: AI-accelerated container builds in the cloud
description: Depot provides cloud-native container build infrastructure that's up to 40x faster than local builds. It integrates with CI/CD pipelines to accelerate Docker builds, with persistent caching and intelligent layer management for development teams.
creator: Depot

name: Railway
tagline: Instant cloud deployment with zero DevOps overhead
description: Railway is a deployment platform that lets developers ship infrastructure without managing servers. With automatic scaling, built-in databases, and instant deployments from Git, it eliminates DevOps complexity for modern application teams.
creator: Railway

name: Gitpod
tagline: AI-ready cloud development environments
description: Gitpod provides instant, cloud-based development environments that spin up in seconds from any Git context. With AI-native workspace support and deep IDE integration, it standardizes development environments for teams building with AI coding agents.
creator: Gitpod

name: Coder
tagline: Self-hosted cloud development environments for enterprises
description: Coder enables enterprises to run cloud development environments on their own infrastructure, giving developers instant access to pre-configured workspaces. It supports AI coding agents, air-gapped deployments, and full security compliance for regulated industries.
creator: Coder

name: Earthly
tagline: AI-friendly CI/CD build framework that runs anywhere
description: Earthly is a CI/CD framework that combines Dockerfiles and Makefiles into a portable, repeatable build system. Its containerized approach ensures builds run identically locally and in CI, with AI-assisted build file generation and satellite remote build cache.
creator: Earthly Technologies

name: Convai
tagline: Conversational AI that brings game characters to life
description: Convai provides a conversational AI service designed for games, metaverse, and XR experiences. It enables developers to create NPCs with natural language understanding, emotional responses, and in-game actions that respond dynamically to player interactions.
creator: Convai Inc.

name: Ludo.ai
tagline: AI-powered game concept and asset generation platform
description: Ludo.ai helps game developers generate ideas, concepts, sprites, and video clips using AI. From text prompts to animated clips, it offers a comprehensive suite of tools tailored for the gaming industry including game concept generation, image generation, and sprite creation.
creator: Ludo.ai

name: Scenario
tagline: AI creative infrastructure for game art production
description: Scenario is a creative AI infrastructure platform trusted by 15,000+ customers for generating consistent game art assets. It allows teams to train custom models on their own art style, automate production workflows, and scale asset creation 10x faster with full IP governance.
creator: Scenario

name: HouseCanary CanaryAI
tagline: AI-powered property valuations and market intelligence
description: HouseCanary's CanaryAI delivers instant property valuations, predictive analytics, and detailed neighborhood insights for real estate professionals. It features AI-driven property condition analysis from listing photos, off-market lead generation, and automated valuation models (AVMs) for competitive pricing.
creator: HouseCanary

name: EliseAI
tagline: Agentic AI for multifamily housing leasing and management
description: EliseAI is an industry-leading AI platform for multifamily housing that automates leasing, resident communication, and property management. Its conversational AI agents handle prospect inquiries 24/7, schedule tours, follow up on leads, and manage maintenance requests, significantly reducing costs while improving conversion rates.
creator: EliseAI

name: Saleswise
tagline: AI-powered CMAs, marketing, and virtual room remodels
description: Saleswise is an AI-powered tool that streamlines creating comparative market analyses, writing professional emails, and visualizing room transformations. It helps real estate agents serve clients faster with data-backed pricing, virtual remodels to help clients visualize updates, and live market data integration.
creator: Saleswise

name: Lofty
tagline: AI-enhanced CRM for real estate pipeline optimization
description: Lofty is an AI-enhanced CRM tailored for real estate professionals focusing on client relationship management and pipeline optimization. It features AI-powered lead scoring, automated follow-up sequences, predictive analytics for client behavior, and smart task prioritization to help agents close deals faster.
creator: Lofty

name: Pando Pi
tagline: AI teams for autonomous freight procurement and logistics
description: Pando Pi launched in February 2025 as AI-powered teams for logistics, enabling autonomous freight procurement, planning, and payments for global brands. Its AI agents eliminate manual work in transportation management, freight procurement, and supply chain optimization using a proprietary supply chain knowledge graph.
creator: Pando

name: MarkIt
tagline: AI agents for global trade compliance and tariff management
description: MarkIt is a YC-backed startup (founded 2025) building AI agents that work inside trade professionals' existing workflows — Excel, PDFs, and broker portals. It automates tariff classification, ACE report audits, and maintains a self-updating system of record for global trade compliance, helping companies navigate the increasingly complex tariff landscape.
creator: MarkIt

name: Prodensus
tagline: Agentic AI platform for freight data and RFP management
description: Prodensus is an Irish AI-native startup revolutionizing freight management with its agentic AI platform that cleans and processes freight RFPs in minutes. Partnered with SONAR and backed by Microsoft Azure, it helps freight brokers win more business by automating RFP responses, data analysis, and emissions reporting.
creator: Prodensus

name: Saudara AI
tagline: AI broker connecting American brands with vetted overseas factories
description: Saudara AI is a YC-backed AI broker (founded 2026) that connects American brands with vetted overseas factories, fixing the broken international sourcing process. US brands import over $3 trillion in goods annually and lose billions to ghost suppliers and hidden fees — Saudara AI's AI handles sourcing 10x faster at a fraction of the cost.
creator: Saudara AI

name: Mastery Logistics
tagline: AI-powered logistics automation for food supply chains
description: Mastery Logistics Systems was named a 2025 Top Tech Startup by Food Logistics and Supply & Demand Chain Executive. Its AI-powered automation platform streamlines food supply chain operations, reducing waste and improving efficiency across procurement, inventory management, and distribution workflows.
creator: Mastery Logistics Systems

name: GETASAP
tagline: AI-driven fresh produce distribution with same-day delivery
description: GETASAP rebuilds fresh produce distribution around real demand and fast execution using AI. It uses micro-fulfillment centers and analyzes live retail sales, purchasing, and waste patterns to decide what to source, where to place inventory, and when to replenish — delivering wholesale produce with 8-hour same-day delivery.
creator: GETASAP
